ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_title" TEXT /* Title of the training program */,
  "program_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the training program */,
  "nett_fee" TEXT /* Net fee payable by the trainees */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training program */,
  "area_of_training" TEXT /* Area of training (e.g., Work Preparatory Series, Food & Beverage Skills) */,
  "training_provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training provider offering the program */,
  "program_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program category */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_training_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_provider_id") REFERENCES training_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_program_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_category_id") REFERENCES program_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the training provider */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "provider_address" TEXT /* Address of the provider */,
  "provider_description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainees" (
  "trainee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainee */,
  "trainee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainee */,
  "disability_type" TEXT /* Type of disability (e.g., visually impaired, hearing impaired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trainee's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trainee's profile was last updated */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "trainee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainee enrolled in the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the trainee enrolled in the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, completed, withdrawn) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the program was completed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_trainee_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainee_id") REFERENCES trainees ("trainee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Work Preparatory Series, Food & Beverage Skills Training) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer conducting the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_sessions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training provider the trainer belongs to */,
  "trainer_qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES training_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., payment, refund) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the trainee (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the trainee */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Additional suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_feedback_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trainer, trainee) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the progress */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session associated with the progress */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was recorded */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of the progress (e.g., in-progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_progress_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES program_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_progress_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program offering the certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "certification_description" TEXT /* Description of the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainee_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certification earned */,
  "trainee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainee who earned the certification */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id", "trainee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_payment_terms" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training provider */,
  "payment_term" TEXT /* Payment terms for the provider (e.g., 30 days, 60 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluation_results" TEXT /* Results of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_evaluation_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)
